title: Crispy Greek Squash Stir-fry
description: An earthy and crispy vegetarian dish featuring squash alongside pickled elements to help cure hangovers.

ingredients.name: Squash
ingredients.notes: Any variety of squash can be used.

ingredients.name: Pickled Vegetables
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or health food stores.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: For a milder taste, use garlic powder instead.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: To add a bit of spice to the dish.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Any neutral-flavored oil can be used, such as avocado or sunflower oil.

ingredients.name: Oregano Leaves
ingredients.notes: For a more authentic flavor, use dried oregano if fresh is unavailable.

instructions: Cut the squash into thin slices and season with salt. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the squash slices to the pan in a single layer. Cook for approximately 5 minutes or until they start turning golden brown on the edges.
Remove the squash from the oven and add pickled vegetables, red pepper flakes, oregano leaves, and salt. Toss everything together well until evenly coated with flavors.
Return the mixture to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the squash is tender and crispy on top.
